task: Audit the project for cross-thread reporting conflicts.

linked_goal.reason: The audit maintains reliable coordination state across Codex threads.

summary: Audited recent dashboard run and thread reports for reporting conflicts, consolidated clear current-status fields, and updated handoff and completion summary.

conflicting_status_claims.summary: completion-summary.md previously said no blockers while current-status.json and recent reports recorded a missing-task-details blocker.
Status values are mixed across files: older values such as verified/completed/not_started appear alongside AGENTS.md statuses.

duplicate_work.summary: No duplicate implementation work was found. The placeholder-task blocker was reported by more than one reporting task.

done_without_verification.summary: No audited done task was clearly missing verification evidence. Reporting-only tasks correctly marked application tests as not_run when no application behavior changed.

stale_current_status_fields.summary: current-status.json was stale relative to the reporting-only run and has been consolidated.

missing_next_recommended_prompts.summary: No audited recent run report or Markdown thread summary was missing a next recommended prompt.

completed_work.title: Audit source read
completed_work.evidence: Read current status, main goal, handoff, completion summary, latest report, recent run reports, and recent Markdown thread summaries.

completed_work.title: Reporting consolidation
completed_work.evidence: Updated current-status.json, HANDOFF.md, completion-summary.md, latest.md, and created this audit report.

remaining_work: Align protocol status taxonomy and report schema with AGENTS.md.
Provide a concrete implementation task to replace the placeholder request.

blockers.title: Placeholder task details
blockers.details: Implementation remains blocked until actual task details are supplied.

verification.name: audit_inputs_read
verification.details: Read the requested dashboard status, goal, handoff, recent run reports, and recent Markdown thread summaries.

verification.name: application_tests
verification.details: No application tests were run because this audit modified only dashboard reporting files and no application code exists in the workspace.

verification.name: json_parse_check
verification.details: All JSON files under .agent-dashboard parsed successfully with PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json after audit updates.

next_recommended_prompts: Align .agent-dashboard/protocol/status-taxonomy.md and report-schema.md with AGENTS.md, then update reports to use one status vocabulary.

secret_handling.notes: No secrets, credentials, tokens, cookies, private keys, or raw logs were added.
